allow: PowerShell($env:SSH_PASS = 'HFTTFbf6!8%V'; .\\.venv\\Scripts\\python.exe ssh_helper.py 'CLAUDE_REAL=$\(readlink -f $\(which claude 2>/dev/null\) 2>/dev/null\) && if [ -n \\"$CLAUDE_REAL\\" ]; then chmod -R a+rX $\(dirname \\"$CLAUDE_REAL\\"\) 2>/dev/null; chmod -R a+rX $\(dirname $\(dirname \\"$CLAUDE_REAL\\"\)\) 2>/dev/null; chmod -R a+rX $\(dirname $\(dirname $\(dirname \\"$CLAUDE_REAL\\"\)\)\) 2>/dev/null; fi && echo OK')
